behaviors.behavior: onReplaySettled fires after the snapshot write settles

behaviors.behavior: WRITER re-converges to real width after a replay settle (sends resize)

behaviors.behavior: READER does NOT converge after a replay settle (#150 reader-reflow guard)

behaviors.behavior: real browser: a resize frame is emitted on the terminal WS immediately (<150ms) before the launch command
live glyph outcome: no 'D er' title-char collision on the prompt row with a real long-title Claude session
behaviors.reason: the live visual outcome needs an authenticated Claude TUI + long title + narrow pane; the isolated E2E stack has no Claude auth, so a human confirms in the live webui
